raw_excerpt: The wrong fight A few weeks ago, a piece from Citrini Research arguing that stablecoins would disintermediate Visa and Mastercard sent card stocks down sharply. Crypto Twitter cheered. The thesis felt clean: AI agents will optimize every transaction, interchange is a tax, stablecoins route around it. I spend my days in crypto and I wanted...
title: Agentic commerce won’t kill cards, but it’ll open a gap
